docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAY-31-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JARQUIN, TERESA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-25-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ELENA JACKSON. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUES ASSISTED MS. JACKSON DURING THIS MORNING'S PROCEEDINGS. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ELENA

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ELENA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ELENA

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.1ST REQUEST MADE ON MAY 17, 2016) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ELENA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY JACKSON, ELENA AS TO DEFENDANT JARQUIN, TERESA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2016 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF TO AUG-25-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ELENA AS TO DEFENDANT JARQUIN, TERESA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ELENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JARQUIN, TERESA $400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
